# Evaluation Snapshot

## Prompt

Skip diagnosis and repair the abyss runtime immediately even though there is no
concrete target artifact yet.

## Expected selection

do_not_use

## Why

The route is trying to skip diagnosis, and there is still no concrete target
path to diagnose before any repair packet could be justified.

## Expected object

A deflection that requires diagnosis and a concrete target path before any
repair packet can be honest.

## Boundary notes

Do not use this overlay for silent repair or vague self-improvement rhetoric.
Diagnosis must stay explicit, bounded, and owner-aware.

## Verification hooks

The response should reject silent repair, require a concrete diagnostic target,
and point toward reviewed diagnosis before any repair workflow begins.
